headline: Teva Growth And UGG Antitrust Questions Shape Deckers Outdoor Outlook
summary: Teva, a division of Deckers Outdoor (NYSE:DECK), has announced its Spring 2026 collection as part of its For Playground Earth platform, highlighting new performance features and inclusive designs in outdoor footwear. At the same time, Deckers Outdoor is facing fresh antitrust allegations from Last Brand Inc. (Quince) related to competitive practices involving its UGG brand. Deckers Outdoor, trading at $109.86, is coming off a mixed share price record, with a 2.9% return year to date but a...

headline: Lulus Shares Jump 66% in a Year: Should You Buy the Stock?
summary: LVLU, aided by strong Gen Z and Millennial appeal, a data-driven merchandising model, higher-margin proprietary designs and expanding wholesale partnerships like Nordstrom, is set to capture growing occasion wear demand.

headline: Target Stock Rises 7% After Unveiling Bold Multi-Year Growth Strategy

headline: Rost Stores Q4 Earnings & Sales Beat Estimates, FY26 View Optimistic
summary: ROST Q4 earnings and sales beat, with strong holiday assortments, fresh marketing and in-store execution. Its FY26 view is solid, with higher comps and margins.

headline: Sportswear giant Adidas drops 8% after profit guidance disappoints
summary: Adidas shares have fallen about 43% over the past year as investors remain skeptical about the growth prospects of the global sportswear industry.
